thresholdOverrides.reason: Recursive backtracking solver: constraint propagation of forced singles, MRV cell selection, and depth-first guessing share one mutable grid. Splitting fragments that shared state without aiding readability.

Fixpoint technique loop (naked singles, then per-region hidden singles) with early-exit flags driving re-iteration. The interleaved progressed/break control flow is intrinsic to the solve-until-stuck rating loop.

Randomized flood-fill region growth: frontier expansion under a random size target with backtrack-free fill. The nested frontier/while loop mutates one region array and reads cleanest as a single pass.
Sudoku pointing scan: per box, per digit, confined-to-line detection over row/col sets. Already split from claiming(); further extraction would only relocate the unavoidable box×digit nesting.
